steps.t: Kelsey West is in Tinnudir. Orchalwë is distrustful of the young man loitering at the Ranger's camp on Tinnudir and wants to know his motives.
Orchalwë is at Tinnudir. Orchalwë will be interested to hear what Kelsey had to say.
Kelsey West is at Tinnudir. Orchalwë asked you to inform Kelsey that the Rangers would help.
Basil Gummidge is in Ost Forod, north-east of Tinnudir. Kelsey West and Orchalwë directed you to seek out the arbiter of Ost Forod and let him know th…
